summary: Tested all 10 REST PERIOD SELECTOR features on the Today page. All features are working correctly. RestSelector chips are visible in ExerciseCard, default 5:00 chip is highlighted in gold (#C9A84C), chip selection changes work, CustomRestModal opens with correct inputs, RestTimerBar shows exercise name + countdown format, timer auto-stops at 0 with DONE ✓, and reset button works.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Rest Period Selector feature is fully working. All 10 test cases passed. The feature includes: RestSelector chips in ExerciseCard, gold #C9A84C highlighted default chip (5:00 for Primary), chip tap changes selection, Custom chip opens bottom sheet, CustomRestModal with min/sec inputs, RestTimerBar with exercise name + X:XX / X:XX countdown, thin progress bar, auto-stop at 0 with DONE ✓ in green, and Reset button.

test_results_detail.2_default_gold_highlight: PASS - Confirmed via CSS: 5:00 chip has borderColor rgb(201,168,76) = #C9A84C
test_results_detail.3_chip_selection_change: PASS - Clicking 3:00 changes active chip (3:00 gets gold border, 5:00 loses it)
test_results_detail.4_custom_modal_opens: PASS - Custom chip triggers CustomRestModal bottom sheet
test_results_detail.5_custom_modal_inputs: PASS - Min/sec TextInputs visible + SET REST PERIOD button
test_results_detail.6_timer_bar_exercise_name: PASS - After logging set, RestTimerBar shows 'SSB Squat' above time
test_results_detail.7_countdown_format: PASS - Shows format 4:59 / 5:00 with active dot
test_results_detail.8_progress_bar: PASS - Thin 2px progress bar at top fills left-to-right (confirmed in code + screenshot)
test_results_detail.9_timer_auto_stop_done: PASS - Timer auto-stopped, showed '0:00 / 0:05 DONE ✓' in green
test_results_detail.10_reset_button: PASS - Reset button returns timer to full duration (5:00) in stopped state
